summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification for 10 open candidate PRs. No shared canonical was selected. One PR (#90069) is safe to plan for superseded closeout by hydrated merged PR #92343; the remaining PRs should stay open for maintainer review, proof, author follow-up, or independent handling.

actions.reason: The PR documents behavior that the hydrated merged fix changed; closing as superseded is clearer than keeping stale docs open.
